title: Gate routing-shadow cohort readiness before any training
goal: Audit the prospectively collected routing-shadow cohort for inclusion integrity, representativeness, sufficient preregistered coverage, semantic-label quality, abstention and missingness before any offline ML baseline training is authorized.

acceptance.assertion: Audit proves that cohort membership was frozen prospectively before outcomes and reports every eligible inclusion, rejection, duplicate and capture error so successful cases cannot be selectively retained.

Report coverage across preregistered task classes, risk/context strata, actual/recommended routes and route schema v1/v2 separately; no representativeness claim is made for unobserved or materially under-covered strata.

Minimum sample and per-stratum coverage thresholds are defined and reviewed before looking at comparative model performance; insufficient coverage yields a FAIL or CONTINUE-COLLECTING result, not relaxed post-hoc criteria.
Quantify reviewed semantic-label availability, primary-evidence completeness, abstention, disagreement and missingness; lifecycle success is never promoted into a semantic label.
Aborts, infrastructure failures, capture rejections and unsealed cases are explicitly counted and analyzed for selection bias rather than silently discarded.
Revalidate privacy allowlists, no-effect constants, create-only identity/dedup integrity and absence of test/quarantined contamination in the evaluation cohort.
Produce a reviewed PASS, FAIL or CONTINUE-COLLECTING gate result bound to an immutable cohort identity and preregistered criteria. Only PASS may unblock OPERATOR-ML-READINESS-V1-T002.
This task performs readiness auditing only and cannot train models, change routing policy, promote a model, enable online learning or influence live operator decisions.

does_not_establish: ML training readiness until this task returns reviewed PASS
sufficient sample size before preregistered thresholds pass
metadata.blocking_reason: The reviewed readiness gate returned CONTINUE-COLLECTING. The live prospective cohort contains zero eligible natural treatment task cases, and capture/record v2 cannot yet measure independent semantic-review disagreement, production versus test/quarantine provenance, or execution-abort versus infrastructure-failure provenance. Unknown signals are not treated as zero, so PASS criteria are not met.
metadata.reaudit_condition: First complete OPERATOR-ML-READINESS-V1-T005 so the three structural observability gaps become measurable without rewriting historical cohort truth. Then re-run this same gate after at least 20 natural eligible treatment task cases have been prospectively captured, while preserving preregistered completeness, evidence, integrity, privacy, no-effect and coverage thresholds. Only a separately reviewed PASS may unblock OPERATOR-ML-READINESS-V1-T002.
